fullText: EX35 CR01 Pack Pick Cart testing results Examples from mod spec If need < max - this is a P9 task to the need and a P60 task to the max, we request need with exceed flag unchecked. Example : One P9 Task is generated and one P60 Item invn by locn before Task/pick location max before Scan task, enter item barcode prompt, user hits CTRL + D to invoke full short screen. Locn auto adjusts to 0, replenishments generate to the pick location max If need < max Example 2: Two P9 Tasks are generated and one P60 Item invn by locn before Scan task, enter item barcode prompt, user hits CTRL + D to invoke full short screen. Locn auto adjusts to 0, replenishments generate to the pick location max If need < max. Example 3: One P9 Task is generated and one P60 Item invn by locn before Scan task, enter item barcode prompt, user hits CTRL + D to invoke full short screen. Locn auto adjusts to 0, replenishments generate to the pick location max if need > Max - we need Two P9 and one P60, both requested with Exceed flag checked.
